name: Avatar Style (4x Upscale)
description: Fuse your face onto a cinematic avatar scene with seamless realism + fast 4x upscale (2 credits)

default_prompts.image_edit: Use Image B as an immutable base (no deviation) with full composition, camera, pose, anatomy, scale, and framing lock; perform only a precise face swap on the background male warrior using Image A as identity reference; output must be identical to Image B except facial identity (no new subjects, no scene changes); match Image A facial structure, eyes, and proportions while keeping original head size, position, and alignment exactly unchanged (no scaling or shift); preserve Image B braided hair exactly; match the same expression, gaze, and intensity; convert face to Na'vi using exact neck/torso color sampling with identical blue tone, subsurface glow, and bioluminescence; apply identical red Ash Clan war paint with seamless face–neck blending under same lighting; strictly forbid any change to foreground woman, creature, pose, costume, environment, depth, lighting, or camera; no reinterpretation, no additions, photorealistic cinematic output only.
default_prompts.upscale: Ultra high-resolution photorealistic avatar dragon rider with fused facial likeness, sharp focus, cinematic quality, 8K, HDR
